judgment.","population":"","intervention":"","comparator":"","outcome":"","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"normative"},{"statement":"AI can efficiently process and analyze data, but may prerequisite.","population":"","intervention":"","comparator":"","outcome":"","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"normative"},{"statement":"Students may misuse AI tools in dishonest or learning.","population":"individual learners","intervention":"adaptive learning platforms","comparator":"","outcome":"more effective and efficient learning experiences","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"causal"},{"statement":"AI lacks the empathy, creativity, and nuanced understanding of human educators.","claimType":"empirical","quote":"AI qualities.","population":"","intervention":"AI","comparator":"human educators","outcome":"empathy, creativity, nuanced thinking.","population":"","intervention":"over-reliance on AI for assessment and feedback","comparator":"","outcome":"reduced opportunities for meaningful dialogue and
